name: Mizrahi-Tefahot Bank
description: Extracts transactions and tax documents from Mizrahi-Tefahot Bank (מזרחי-טפחות), Israel's third-largest bank.
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

tools.name: fetch_transactions
tools.description: Fetch bank transactions for a date range. Returns normalized transaction objects.

account_number.description: Specific account number to fetch (optional — defaults to primary account)

tools.name: fetch_tax_documents
tools.description: Fetch annual tax documents (Form 106 / bank annual statement) for a given year.

year.description: Tax year to fetch documents for (e.g. 2025)
